achievements: Deployed and productionized machine learning pipelines on Databricks, ensuring reliable execution of scheduled workflows.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Bitbucket and Jenkins with pull request-based integration and tag-based deployments across Development, Staging, and Production environments.
Collaborated with Machine Learning Engineers to integrate and deploy models into production systems while monitoring and debugging Databricks jobs to improve pipeline reliability.
Managed change requests, production incidents, and Agile sprint tasks using Jira, supporting cross-functional collaboration.
Built an AI-powered Runbook RAG system that mapped real-time Databricks alerts to exact runbook resolution steps, eliminating manual troubleshooting.
Developed a structure-aware PDF parser and context-aware chunking strategy, improving retrieval quality with vector similarity scores between 0.89 and 0.92.
Implemented Qdrant-based vector retrieval with application-level filtering to deliver accurate and context-specific runbook recommendations.
Built an Agentic RAG-powered Insurance Assistant capable of answering insurance queries through intelligent context routing.
Developed a natural language-to-SQL system with read-only safeguards, enabling secure querying of enterprise databases.
Integrated dashboard querying capabilities, allowing users to retrieve KPIs and business insights directly through a chatbot.
Implemented client-level filtering, fallback handling, and an optimized retrieval pipeline, delivering accurate responses with approximately 3-second latency.
Built and deployed ML models for classification and regression problems used in production.
Worked on data preprocessing, feature engineering and model evaluation pipelines.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver end-to-end ML solutions.
